$comment: Canonical citations per indicator, verified from devdatalab.org/shrug docs and primary source pages. Format mirrors the SHRUG documentation page structure: plaintext citation / BibTeX / About / Source URL / Producer / Geographic Coverage / Aggregations / License / Notes.
_global_disclaimer: Neither the data sources, the Development Data Lab, nor Project FINER warrants the accuracy or completeness of this data. Use at your own risk. Cite original sources where applicable.

credit_deposit_ratio.label: SLBC quarterly data
credit_deposit_ratio.plaintext: State Level Bankers' Committee (SLBC) quarterly meeting agendas and data sheets, published by lead-bank convenors per state.
credit_deposit_ratio.geographic_coverage: 22 of 30 SLBC states (covered in FINER as of May 2026): all 8 NE states, Bihar, West Bengal, Jharkhand, Odisha, Chhattisgarh, Kerala, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Rajasthan, Gujarat, Maharashtra, Haryana, Telangana, Uttarakhand, Andhra Pradesh.
credit_deposit_ratio.license: Public information published by SLBC convenor banks
credit_deposit_ratio.source_urls: Per state — see CLAUDE.md > Main Data Sections > SLBC sources

rbi_banking_outlets.label: RBI Banking Outlet Locator
rbi_banking_outlets.plaintext: Reserve Bank of India, Database on Indian Economy (DBIE) — Banking Outlet Locator. Comprehensive registry of branches, ATMs, Business Correspondents, CSPs, and Digital Banking Units across India.

nfhs_health_insurance.label: NFHS-5 (2019–21) — Health Insurance Coverage
nfhs_health_insurance.plaintext: International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) and ICF. 2021. National Family Health Survey (NFHS-5), 2019–21: India. Mumbai: IIPS.
nfhs_health_insurance.indicator_definition: Households with any usual member covered under a health insurance or health-financing scheme.
nfhs_health_insurance.producer: International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS); ICF; Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India

aadhaar_enrollment.label: UIDAI district enrolment data
aadhaar_enrollment.plaintext: Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI). District-level Aadhaar enrolment counts by date, age group, and pincode for April–December 2025.
aadhaar_enrollment.notes: Source files: aadhaar_enrolment_2025_combined.csv, UIDAI_enrollment_detailed.csv, district_wise_aadhaar_registration.csv (downloaded March 2026). Original URL not retained — citation is best-effort.

nrlm_shg.label: DAY-NRLM Self-Help Groups
nrlm_shg.plaintext: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana — National Rural Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NRLM), Ministry of Rural Development, Government of India. District-level data on Self-Help Groups (SHGs) under the NRLM portal.
nrlm_shg.indicator_definition: Number of women's Self-Help Groups formed and credit-linked under NRLM.
nrlm_shg.producer: Ministry of Rural Development, Government of India

facebook_rwi.label: Meta Relative Wealth Index 2021
facebook_rwi.plaintext_module: Chi, Guanghua, Han Fang, Sourav Chatterjee, and Joshua E. Blumenstock. "Microestimates of wealth for all low- and middle-income countries." Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 119, no. 3 (2022): e2113658119.
facebook_rwi.plaintext_shrug: Asher, Sam, Tobias Lunt, Ryu Matsuura, and Paul Novosad. "Development research at high geographic resolution: an analysis of night-lights, firms, and poverty in India using the SHRUG open data platform." The World Bank Economic Review 35, no. 4 (2021): 845–871.
facebook_rwi.about: Meta/Facebook's Relative Wealth Index (RWI) predicted for every populated 2.4-km grid cell in India. Supervised machine-learning trained on Demographic and Health Surveys ground truth, satellite imagery, mobile-network data, topographic maps, and aggregated/deidentified Facebook connectivity data. Released 2021 (DHS round 2015–16).
facebook_rwi.geographic_coverage: National (625 districts in our extracted sample)
facebook_rwi.producer: Meta Data for Good (Chi, Fang, Chatterjee, Blumenstock); SHRUG aggregation by Development Data Lab
facebook_rwi.license_text: Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International. Non-commercial use only. Attribution required. Derivatives must share-alike under same license.

viirs_nightlights.label: VIIRS Annual Nightlights
viirs_nightlights.plaintext_module: Asher, Sam, Tobias Lunt, Ryu Matsuura, and Paul Novosad. "Development research at high geographic resolution: an analysis of night-lights, firms, and poverty in India using the SHRUG open data platform." The World Bank Economic Review 35, no. 4 (2021): 845–871.
viirs_nightlights.about: Gridded night lights data, aggregated and calibrated for consistent time-series estimation. Annual VIIRS composites available 2012–2023. Two variants: 'average-masked' (smoother) and 'median-masked' (more robust to fires/outliers). FINER uses median-masked.
viirs_nightlights.geographic_coverage: National (625 districts in our extracted sample, 2012–2023)
viirs_nightlights.producer: Colorado School of Mines, Earth Observatory Group (NOAA/CSM); SHRUG aggregation by Development Data Lab

pmgsy_roads.label: PMGSY Rural Roads (cumulative through 2015)
pmgsy_roads.plaintext_module: Asher, Sam, and Paul Novosad. "Rural Roads and Local Economic Development." American Economic Review 110, no. 3 (2020): 797–823.
pmgsy_roads.plaintext_shrug: Asher, Sam, Tobias Lunt, Ryu Matsuura, and Paul Novosad. "Development research at high geographic resolution: an analysis of night-lights, firms, and poverty in India using the SHRUG open data platform." The World Bank Economic Review 35, no. 4 (2021): 845–871.
pmgsy_roads.about: Administrative data from the Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY) rural road construction program, launched by the Government of India to provide connectivity to unconnected habitations as part of a poverty reduction strategy. Habitations are smaller than villages; for each village, road variables describe the earliest new and upgraded roads completed within a shrid.
pmgsy_roads.geographic_coverage: National (542 districts with completed roads by 2015)
pmgsy_roads.producer: National Rural Roads Development Authority (NRRDA), Ministry of Rural Development; SHRUG aggregation by Development Data Lab
pmgsy_roads.notes: Cumulative through 2015. PMGSY continues; later years would require fresh extraction from omms.nic.in.

_shrug_disclaimer: SHRUG datasets are licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Quoting Development Data Lab: 'Neither DDL nor the contributors of data to DDL shall be held liable for any improper or incorrect use or application of the data provided.' Visit https://www.devdatalab.org/shrug for the latest version.

digital_transactions.label: PhonePe Pulse
digital_transactions.plaintext: PhonePe Pulse — open data on digital payment transactions through the PhonePe UPI platform. Per-district aggregates for transaction count and amount.
digital_transactions.license: Open data under PhonePe Pulse terms

capital_markets_access.label: CDSL + NSDL + AMFI registries
capital_markets_access.plaintext: Combined district-level counts from CDSL Depository Participant service centres, NSDL DP service centres, and AMFI Mutual Fund Distributor registries.
capital_markets_access.producer: CDSL (Central Depository Services Limited), NSDL (National Securities Depository Limited), AMFI (Association of Mutual Funds in India)
